dialogues: Last one! Here are scores from four teams. Yellow Team won with 70 points.
You've done this vertical and horizontal now. Same process every time: check the numbers, choose the scale.
Which scale works best for this data?
Right. All values end in 0 or 5, and the biggest is 70. Scale of 10 gives you a clean graph.
Now create the graph. Place each bar at the right length.
Click to place the bar for Red Team at 25 points.
Click to place the bar for Blue Team at 40 points.
Click to place the bar for Green Team at 55 points.
Click to place the bar for Yellow Team at 70 points.
That's it. You chose the scale and placed every bar exactly where it should be, some exactly on the lines and some halfway between.
